ok so there are 4 realms. You can use 2 different ones at a time. Mixing realms makes them lose 50% of their functions (damage, shields, health regen, etc) with one exception; 

Chaos (Yellow Mask) - Can mix with any realm without them losing mechanics and it will add additional functions depending on the realm.

Caro (Red Fangs) - They are very damage oriented and have a charge meter at the top that produces "embryos". Embryos have 2 functions; 1 is that they are consumed on a Caro character's exalt to give it additional effects ("Devour") and its second function is to give Exalt charge (ailemus) to any character. 

Aeqour (Blue Tentacle) - Fairly straight forward, tentacles slap at the end of the turn and generate over time. You can change "stances" by clicking on the tentacles in the top left. White stance gives shields, red consumes one tentacle for extra damage and follow up attacks. 

Ultra (Purple Diamond) - This one can get really complicated. Simplest explanation is; First card played each turn goes into the ultra bar, when bar is full, you can go into extra turn. you can choose to click on the black hole to the left of the bar to gain 1 "inspiration" (draw 1 and +1 arithmetica).
